allow: PowerShell($src='C:\\Git\\linx-ingress-service\\publish\\MqiptConsumer-win-x64'; $tmp=Join-Path $env:TEMP 'LinxDeployTest'; if\(Test-Path $tmp\){Remove-Item $tmp -Recurse -Force}; & "$src\\Deploy-LinxConsumers.ps1" -SourceDir $src -DestRoot $tmp -SkipServices -MqHost '10.0.0.5'; "`n=== Layout ==="; Get-ChildItem $tmp -Recurse -File | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Substring\($tmp.Length+1\) } ; "`n=== VSCSLEI config \(host patched, queue/stream/delivery from sample\) ==="; Get-Content \(Join-Path $tmp 'VSCSLEI\\appsettings.json'\) -Raw; "`n=== TDCSLEI delivery should be Relaxed ==="; \(Get-Content \(Join-Path $tmp 'TDCSLEI\\appsettings.json'\) -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json\).DeliveryMode; Remove-Item $tmp -Recurse -Force; "`n\(temp cleaned\)")
